name: @smith/matrix
description: Smith terminal-native Code OSS downstream planning and MVP foundation.

scripts.verify:mvp0: npm run build:mvp0 && npm run test:mvp0 && npm run evidence:mvp0
scripts.verify:mvp1: npm run build:mvp0 && npm run test:mvp1
scripts.verify:mvp: npm run verify:mvp0 && npm run verify:mvp1 && npm run verify:mvp2 && npm run verify:mvp3 && npm run verify:mvp4
scripts.verify:product-mvp: npm run verify:mvp && npm run test:product-mvp && npm run test:manual-mvp && npm run test:pty-mvp && npm run screenshots:mvp && npm run test:product-mvp-gate
